    1. verify(WebKey)

Interface IuPkiVerifier

public interface IuPkiVerifier
Public interface for resources capable of verifying a WebKey as containing a trusted certificate chain.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    verify(edu.iu.crypt.WebKey jwk)
    Verifies a WebKey as containing a trusted certificate chain.

  • Method Details

    • verify

      void verify(edu.iu.crypt.WebKey jwk) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Verifies a WebKey as containing a trusted certificate chain.
      Parameters:
      jwk - WebKey
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the certificate is invalid; the cause should include further detail on the failure
